typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		name_last_clean as string,
		name_first as string,
		gender as string,
		city as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		birth_date as date,
		julian_month as short,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		data_source as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		aka_name as string,
		province as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		{} as string,
		phone_number as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		patient_nbr as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT    tps2.row_id   ,tps2.hosp_patient_nbr   ,tps2.name_first   ,tps2.name_first_middle_clean   ,tps2.name_last_clean   ,tps2.birth_date   ,tps2.gender   ,tps2.aka_name   ,tps2.street_addr1   ,tps2.street_addr2   ,tps2.city   ,tps2.postal_code   ,tps2.province   ,tps2.phone_number   ,tps2.data_source   ,tps2.dupe_count   ,tps2.julian_month   ,tps2.patient_nbr   ,tps2.phn   ,tps2.phn_clean FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] tps2 LEFT JOIN (      SELECT              row_id      FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_name_first_middle_split]      WHERE (output_string IN (\'stillborn\', \'newborn\', \'baby\') /* 20200801: for these three we don\'t care for the position to handle spelling issues like NEW BORN, STILL BORN, and BAB Y. same doesn\'t apply for the list below	*/                OR (output_string IN (\'twin\', \'girl\', \'boy\', \'sb\') AND position <= 100) )       EXCEPT      SELECT              row_id      FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_name_first_middle_split]      WHERE output_string NOT IN (\'stillborn\', \'newborn\', \'baby\', \'twin\', \'girl\', \'boy\', \'sb\', \'MALE\', \'FEMALE\', \'NEW\',      \'BORN\', \'STILL\', \'BAB\', \'ABY\') AND position <= 100 AND LEN(output_string) > 1      /*20200801: the last few after \'FEMALE\' is to cover the issue above, overtime we may have to adjust this */  	   ) true_bb 	  on tps2.row_id=true_bb.row_id WHERE true_bb.row_id IS NULL  and birth_date is not null and gender is not null and ((name_first_middle_clean is not null and  name_first_middle_clean NOT like \'[A-Z] [A-Z] [A-Z] [A-Z]\' and name_first_middle_clean not like \'[A-Z] [A-Z] [A-Z]\' and name_first_middle_clean not like \'[A-Z] [A-Z]\' AND LEN(name_first_middle_clean)>1 and NOT (name_first_middle_clean=name_last_clean and len(name_First_middle_clean)<=3)) or (name_first_middle_clean is null and len(name_last_clean)>4 and name_last_clean not like \'[A-Z] [A-Z] [A-Z]\'))  ;',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcfzinput	source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT   ms1.[row_id]   ,ms1.[stage_id]   ,ms1.[row_score]   ,ms1.[phn]   ,ms1.[phn_clean]   ,ms1.[name_first_middle]   ,ms1.[name_last]   ,ms1.name_first_middle_clean   ,ms1.name_last_clean   ,ms1.[birth_date]   ,ms1.[gender]   ,ms1.[dupe_count]   ,ms1.[master_row_id]   ,ms1.[master_phn]   ,ms1.[master_name_first_middle]   ,ms1.[master_name_last]   ,ms1.[master_birth_date]   ,ms1.[master_gender]   ,ms1.[match_code] FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_master_stg1] ms1   INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT 				birth_date 				,gender 			  FROM 				[ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2]) ps2 	ON ps2.birth_date=ms1.birth_date 	   AND ps2.gender=ms1.gender  LEFT JOIN (       SELECT              row_id      FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_name_first_middle_split]      WHERE (output_string IN (\'stillborn\', \'newborn\', \'baby\') /* 20200801: for these three we don\'t care for the position to handle spelling issues like NEW BORN, STILL BORN, and BAB Y. same doesn\'t apply for the list below	*/                OR (output_string IN (\'twin\', \'girl\', \'boy\', \'sb\') AND position <= 100) )       EXCEPT      SELECT              row_id      FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_name_first_middle_split]      WHERE output_string NOT IN (\'stillborn\', \'newborn\', \'baby\', \'twin\', \'girl\', \'boy\', \'sb\', \'MALE\', \'FEMALE\', \'NEW\',      \'BORN\', \'STILL\', \'BAB\', \'ABY\') AND position <= 100 AND LEN(output_string) > 1      /*20200801: the last few after \'FEMALE\' is to cover the issue above, overtime we may have to adjust this */  ) true_bb 	  on ms1.row_id=true_bb.row_id WHERE true_bb.row_id IS NULL	   AND ms1.conflict_flg IS NULL and ((name_first_middle_clean is not null and  name_first_middle_clean NOT like \'[A-Z] [A-Z] [A-Z] [A-Z]\' and name_first_middle_clean not like \'[A-Z] [A-Z] [A-Z]\' and name_first_middle_clean not like \'[A-Z] [A-Z]\' AND LEN(name_first_middle_clean)>1 and NOT (name_first_middle_clean=name_last_clean and len(name_First_middle_clean)<=3)) or (name_first_middle_clean is null and len(name_last_clean)>4 and name_last_clean not like \'[A-Z] [A-Z] [A-Z]\'));',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcmasterstg1
srcfzinput sink(input(
		name_last_clean as string,
		name_first as string,
		gender as string,
		city as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		julian_month as short,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		data_source as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		aka_name as string,
		province as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		phone_number as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		patient_nbr as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		name_last_clean,
		name_first,
		gender,
		city,
		dupe_count,
		birth_date,
		julian_month,
		street_addr1,
		street_addr2,
		data_source,
		name_first_middle_clean,
		aka_name,
		province,
		hosp_patient_nbr,
		phn,
		phone_number,
		phn_clean,
		row_id,
		postal_code,
		patient_nbr)) ~> destfzinput
srcmasterstg1 sink(input(
		name_last_clean as string,
		match_code as string,
		master_phn as string,
		master_name_first_middle as string,
		gender as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		stage_id as integer,
		master_gender as string,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		row_score as integer,
		name_last as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		master_row_id as string,
		master_birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		phn as string,
		master_name_last as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		row_id as string,
		name_first_middle as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		name_last_clean,
		match_code,
		master_phn,
		master_name_first_middle,
		gender,
		dupe_count,
		stage_id,
		master_gender,
		birth_date,
		row_score,
		name_last,
		name_first_middle_clean,
		master_row_id,
		master_birth_date,
		phn,
		master_name_last,
		phn_clean,
		row_id,
		name_first_middle)) ~> destmasterstg2
